review: Beautiful solid oak 8x10 frame. The grain is lovely and the corners are cleanly joined - not a gap anywhere. It holds my watercolor perfectly and the glass was well protected in shipping. I'll be back for more sizes.

The walnut 11x14 is even richer in person than the photos. The oil finish brings out the grain and it feels substantial. Fit my finished piece exactly and arrived carefully packed with extra padding around the corners.

The 16x20 black frame is a clean, understated profile that lets the artwork speak. Giving four stars only because one corner had a tiny finish blemish - not visible once hung, and the maker offered to make it right. Still a fine frame.
Ordered the oak 11x14 with the white mat cut for an 8x10 and it saved me a trip to the framer. The bevel on the mat is crisp and the whole thing looks professional. Very pleased.

The walnut 8x10 with the off-white mat is perfect for a small study. The mat opening was exactly 5x7 as described and the color complements the paper nicely. Communication about the ship date was prompt and friendly.

The gray barnwood 8x10 has a nice weathered character without looking cheap. It suits the porch prints I hang for the summer. One edge could have used a touch more sanding but it is barely noticeable once framed.

The natural maple 16x20 is light and clean - just what I wanted for a large watercolor. The slim profile keeps the focus on the art. Well balanced and easy to hang with the hardware included. Highly recommend.

The espresso 11x14 is a handsome dark frame and the stain is even. It set off a darker print very well. Four stars because the hanging wire arrived a bit loose, but a quick tighten fixed it. Would buy again.
This little 5x7 oak frame with the easel back is perfect for a postcard study on the desk. Solid and well finished for such a small piece. Already thinking about ordering a few more as gifts.

The walnut 16x20 with the cream mat cut for 11x14 is a beautiful presentation piece. The mat color warms the whole thing up. It arrived very well packed and the glass was spotless. The maker clearly takes care with each order.
Came back for the tabletop easel after buying several frames, and it is just as well made. It holds a framed 11x14 steadily on the mantel without tipping. Simple, sturdy, and nicely finished.

The black 11x14 with the white mat for an 8x10 looks sharp on the wall. The contrast really makes a print pop. Four stars only because the mat had a faint smudge that wiped away easily. Otherwise a solid, well-built frame.

The large natural oak 16x20 is exactly what my Severn River watercolor needed. The wide flat profile is handsome and the heavier hanging hardware inspires confidence for a bigger piece. Beautifully made.
The maple 8x10 is a lovely light frame for a bird study. The grain is subtle and the finish is smooth to the touch. Fit was perfect and it arrived quickly. Another good one from this shop.
The walnut 8x10 matches the 11x14 I bought earlier, so my small gallery wall is starting to look cohesive. Consistent color and finish between the two. Well packed and prompt as always. Thank you.
